Localization.Description: The following suspicious activity of office programs is detected: creating executables, changing registry keys, loading the DLL of an Internet Explorer COM object, creating threads in other processes' address space

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The Microsoft Office application "{subject.process.name}", launched by user {subject.account.name}, created a set of unusual executable files on the host {event_src.host}
The Microsoft Office application "{subject.process.name}", launched by user {subject.account.name}, loaded an unusual DLL "{object.process.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The Microsoft Office application "{subject.process.name}", launched by user {subject.account.name}, created an unusual executable "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The Microsoft Office application "{subject.process.name}", launched by user {subject.account.name}, changed an unusual registry key "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}

The Microsoft Office application "{subject.process.name}", launched by user {subject.account.name}, created an unusual remote thread in the address space of the process "{object.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
